advancements.mekanism_extras.cosmic_cont: If you dislike them constantly flashing, you can install the built-in resource pack
oh It's as shiny as that alloy
advancements.mekanism_extras.creative_up: If the modpack didn’t add a recipe, you cheated, right?
advancements.mekanism_extras.infinite_co: This thing can definitely be used to run Minecraft
advancements.mekanism_extras.ionic_membr: Make the pump only extract cations or anions, is this reasonable?
advancements.mekanism_extras.radiance_al: Atomic alloy are not the strongest
You are in the midst of radiation, but you don't know
advancements.mekanism_extras.shining_all: Try adding some antimatter to the alloy
advancements.mekanism_extras.spectrum_al: It existed during the Big Bang
advancements.mekanism_extras.stack_upgra: Making one by one is still too slow
advancements.mekanism_extras.supreme_con: The temperature of that alloy didn't actually ruin it?
Perhaps it can operate at high temperatures
advancements.mekanism_extras.thermonucle: It's incredibly hard, but also very hot to the touch, maybe?
Equivalent to the temperature of a star
configuration.mekanism.world.naquadah.ge: Determines if Naquadah ore should be added to world generation.
configuration.mekanism.world.naquadah.mi: Chance that blocks that are directly exposed to air in a Middle Naquadah Vein are not placed.
Determines if End Naquadah Veins should be added to world generation. Note: Requires generating Naquadah ore to be enabled.
Maximum (inclusive) height anchor for Middle Naquadah Veins. This defines the maximum y-level that Middle Naquadah Veins can spawn at.
Maximum number of blocks in a Middle Naquadah Vein.
Minimum (inclusive) height anchor for Middle Naquadah Veins. This defines the minimum y-level that Middle Naquadah Veins can spawn at.
Chance that Middle Naquadah Veins generates in a chunk.
Distribution shape for placing Middle Naquadah Veins.
configuration.mekanism.world.naquadah.sm: Chance that blocks that are directly exposed to air in a Small Naquadah Vein are not placed.
Determines if Small Naquadah Veins should be added to world generation. Note: Requires generating Naquadah ore to be enabled.
Maximum (inclusive) height anchor for Small Naquadah Veins. This defines the maximum y-level that Small Naquadah Veins can spawn at.
Maximum number of blocks in a Small Naquadah Vein.
Minimum (inclusive) height anchor for Small Naquadah Veins. This defines the minimum y-level that Small Naquadah Veins can spawn at.
Chance that Small Naquadah Veins generates in a chunk.
Distribution shape for placing Small Naquadah Veins.
configuration.mekanism_extras.general.pu: Amount of Heavy Water in mB that is extracted per block of Water by the Advanced Electric Pump with a Filter Upgrade.
configuration.mekanism_extras.server.hoh: Rate in mB/t at which Naquadah Hohlraum can accept Nq-U Fuel.
configuration.mekanism_extras.server.rea: Amount of energy (Joules) the naquadah reactor can store.
Amount of fuel (mB) that the naquadah reactor can store.
The fraction of heat from the casing that can be transferred to all sources that are not water. Will impact max heat, heat transfer to thermodynamic conductors, and power generation.
Affects the Injection Rate, Max Temp, and Ignition Temp.
Amount of steam (mB) per injection rate that the naquadah reactor can store. Max = injectionRate * steamPerInjection
Amount of water (mB) per injection rate that the naquadah reactor can store. Max = injectionRate * waterPerInjection
The fraction of the heat dissipated from the case that is converted to Joules.
The fraction of the heat from the casing that is dissipated to water when water cooling is in use. Will impact max heat, and steam generation.

configuration.mekanism_extras.usage.adva: Energy per operation in Joules of: Advanced Electric Pump
description.mekanism_extras.end_naquadah: Compared to the Overworld,naquadah ores are more common in the End, and you can find it near the void.
description.mekanism_extras.lead_coated_: Reactor glass that can prevent the radiation from the reactor.
Compared to the laser focusing matrix, it can prevent radiation.
description.mekanism_extras.naquadah_ore: A type of naquadah that Earth does not have, but you can find one or two near the bedrock layer of the Overworld.
description.mekanism_extras.naquadah_rea: Radiation-proof framing that can be used in the Naquadah Reactor multiblock.
The controlling block for the entire Naquadah Reactor structure.
A block of radiation-proof framing that is capable of managing both the chemical and energy transfer of the Naquadah Reactor.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.mekanism_: Ported "Mekanism-Evolution" to a higher version and added some other things as well
info.mekanism_extras.jei.polonium_contai: When coolant is injected into a Naquadah Reactor, the generated steam will capture polonium-208 that does not decay in the reactor, resulting in polonium containing steam.
info.mekanism_extras.jei.rich_naquadah_f: Rich Naquadah Fuel can be extracted from a Naquadah Hexafluoride source block via an advanced electric pump with a ionic membrane upgrade installed.
info.mekanism_extras.jei.rich_uranium_fu: Rich Uranium Fuel can be extracted from a Uranium Hexafluoride source block via an advanced electric pump with a ionic membrane upgrade installed.
item.mekanism_extras.fluorinated_naquada: Liquid fluorinated Naquadah Uranium Fuel Bucket
mekanism_extras.configuration.title: Mekanism: Extras Config
pack.mekanism_extras.pack_description: Stop the flashing of Cosmic and Infinite's items and blocks
upgrade.mekanism_extras.creative.descrip: The machine does not consume energy and has no working time.
upgrade.mekanism_extras.ionic_membrane.d: Ions can be filtered out from liquids.
upgrade.mekanism_extras.stack.descriptio: Increase the parallel number of work.
